name: All-Nighter
description: Staves off the effects of sleep deprivation for an entire day at a time and enables the user to remain fully awake and be completely alert without sleep. Gives a Perception bonus of +1 and a +3 to save against sedatives or sleep-inducing powers.

limitations.otherLimitations: Only delays the need for sleep; must eventually catch up on rest (4 hours per day skipped). Can only be activated once per day, and may not be used on an unwilling subject. After 7 consecutive days awake, roll for random insanity each day.

ranges.summary: Self or one other by touch.

name: Ashes to Ashes
description: The Nightbane sacrifices a combustible object to transfer fiery damage to an intended target. The object is reduced to ashes instantly, and the fire is directed at the target.

ppe.notes: Cost is 2 P.P.E. for every weight category of the object sacrificed.

limitations.otherLimitations: Object must be combustible (wood, paper, rubber, fabric). Cannot be magic, living plant/animal, ceramic, metal, plastic, stone, or concrete. Must sacrifice whole objects, not parts.

ranges.summary: Touch for the sacrificed object, 100 feet for the attack on the real target.

damage.primaryTargetDamage: Variable based on weight (e.g., 1-2 lbs = 1D6, 85-120 lbs = 2D6x10).
damage.notes: Living targets get a save vs magic (15+) for 20% damage.

notes: Weight to damage categories: 1-2 lbs = 1D6; 3-5 lbs = 2D6; 6-20 lbs = 4D6; 25-35 lbs = 1D4x10; 40-80 lbs = 2D4x10; 85-120 lbs = 2D6x10.

name: Blast Wave
description: Generates a powerful concussive shock wave originating from the Nightbane, sending anyone and anything not secured flying and shattering fragile objects.

ppe.notes: User can only expend 6 P.P.E. per level of experience on activation. Double the activation cost if used in Facade form.

limitations.otherLimitations: Cannot selectively affect targets within the radius/arc except those in physical contact willed to be protected.

ranges.summary: 20 foot radius around the Nightbane, or a 40 foot swath in front.

damage.notes: Victims are thrown 1D6 yards, take 2D6 damage, lose initiative, lose two melee attacks, and suffer -5% to skills for one melee. Save vs impact (16+) reduces damage by half.

name: Bomb-Maker
description: Transforms inert substances into a variety of lethal explosives. Material reverts back to its original form when the duration expires.

ppe.notes: Base cost is an estimate for schema compliance as specific cost varies or is omitted in the summarized reprint.

ranges.summary: Touch.

name: Bookworm
description: Allows the Nightbane to instantly absorb written knowledge by devouring the physical pages. Grants temporary skill use and total recall of the text.

ppe.notes: 1 P.P.E. per 25 pages of mundane text, or 2 P.P.E. per page of a spell book/scroll.

limitations.otherLimitations: Source material is utterly destroyed. Only biological material (paper, parchment) can be devoured.

ranges.summary: Self.

duration.summary: One hour per level of experience.

notes: Temporarily grants 1-4 skills at 90% (or boosts existing skills to 90%+1D6%) required to use the knowledge.

name: Brain Freeze
description: Induces a severe, debilitating pain resembling a 'brain freeze' in a target, scrambling their thoughts and causing severe combat and skill penalties.

enhancement.summary: Extend duration by one melee round up to eight times.

cannotAffect: creatures with radically different physiologies (Nightland Hounds, Hunters, Hollow Men, etc.)

ranges.summary: 200 feet + 20 feet per level of experience; line of sight.

notes: Target must save vs magic (15+). Failure results in -5 Perception, -2 all combat rolls, initiative last, -30% to skills, and inability to cast spells/psionics/talents.

name: Bypass
description: Disables conventional and high-tech locks, electrical surveillance systems, and cameras.

ppe.notes: 1 P.P.E. for simple locks, 2 for standard, 6 for complex mechanical/simple electronic, 14 for advanced electronic/vault doors.

notes: Requires a D20 roll against the lock's difficulty: 15 for advanced, 8 for complex, 5 for standard, 2 for simple.

name: Chain Lightning
description: Unleashes a devastating electrical attack capable of striking multiple enemies in close proximity, with the bolt jumping from one target to the next.

enhancement.summary: Increase damage of the initial blast by 1D6 (max +7D6).

limitations.otherLimitations: Max P.P.E. to activate is limited to 9 per level of experience. Only damages living beings.

ranges.summary: 100 feet + 20 feet per level to a 30 foot radius.

damage.notes: Damage reduces by 1D6 per subsequent target. Extremely effective against users of Darksteel and Nightlands creatures (Hunters take D8s for damage).

name: Channel Speed
description: Taps into Morphus power while in Facade form to temporarily boost Physical Prowess and Speed.

limitations.otherLimitations: User's eyes dim and shadow wisps rise from hands and feet. Registers as supernatural to sensory abilities.

ranges.summary: Self.

notes: Adds +6 to P.P. attribute and +10 to Spd attribute. Grants +1 to initiative and +2 to strike, parry, and dodge.

name: Channel Strength
description: Taps into Morphus power while in Facade form to temporarily boost Physical Strength, Endurance, and S.D.C.

limitations.otherLimitations: User's eyes dim and shadow wisps rise from body. Registers as supernatural to sensory abilities.

ranges.summary: Self.

notes: Adds +10 to P.S., +6 to P.E., and +60 S.D.C. Grants +2 to save vs poison/disease and +2 to save vs psionics. Strength becomes Supernatural.

name: Chronosphere
description: Alters the temporal flow, causing anyone chosen within the radius to move at half normal speed.

ppe.notes: 21 P.P.E. if used in Facade form.

limitations.otherLimitations: Can be used in Facade form without any visual manifestation other than the slowed movement of targets.

ranges.summary: Five foot spherical radius per level of experience.

notes: Targets save vs magic (16+). Failure halves melee attacks and imposes -2 to all combat rolls. Projectiles entering the field are -4 to strike and deal half damage.

name: Darkblast
description: An improved Shadow Blast that fires a large stream of dark energy after charging.

enhancement.summary: Every 2 P.P.E. adds 2D4 damage, up to a maximum of 16 P.P.E. for 1D6x10 damage.

rangeMechanics.summary: Fires a large stream up to 1,500 feet.

notes: It takes a few seconds to charge, meaning each Darkblast counts as two melee attacks.

name: Dark Edge
description: Temporarily imbues any mundane blade with the abilities of a Darkblade, turning its edge ebony. Allows parrying of Darkblades, ignores opponent's A.R., and doubles the normal damage.

cannotAffect: weapons that are part of a Morphus

notes: An imbued blade may be handed off to a friend or ally to use in combat.

name: Darkmetal Infusion
description: Reinforces a single stationary object with the strength of Nightlands Darkmetal, blackening it and preventing penetration until the object's total S.D.C. is depleted.

structureReinforcements.targetSummary: A stationary object or portion thereof.

repeatableScaling.summary: Cost is 5 P.P.E. per 100 S.D.C. added, maximum 500 S.D.C.

structureReinforcements.notes: The object cannot be moved or the Talent's effects are immediately negated.

name: Death-Grip
description: Allows the user to hold tight to objects or opponents with an unbreakable grip. Inflicts no damage.

physicalCombatStatModifiers.notes: Target requires Supernatural P.S. twice that of the user to break free. Cannot be disarmed.

name: Down the Drain
description: Liquefies the user and up to two passengers and their belongings to travel through plumbing or sewer systems.

rangeMechanics.summary: Self and up to two others by touch. Must be within 3 feet of a drain.

mobilityBlocks.summary: Movement speed is a constant 1,000 feet per minute unless current is faster.

statusEffects.name: Liquefied Form
statusEffects.summary: Immune to toxins/poisons and all physical attacks, but cannot attack. -4 on Perception Rolls.

name: Dust in the Wind
description: Triggered before reaching zero Hit Points, the user disintegrates into black dust particles whisked away to a safe point, where they reconstitute and fall into a coma until fully healed.

recoveryStateUntilThreshold.notes: Remains a pile of dust in hiding place until regeneration thresholds are met.

mobilityBlocks.summary: Whisked away on a magical breeze up to 2,000 feet.

notes: Takes two melee attacks to activate. Leaves character in a coma while recovering.

name: Earthworks
description: Shapes natural ground or manmade materials to create defensive walls, trenches, or escape tunnels.

rangeMechanics.summary: 5 feet + 5 feet per level. Total volume 360 cubic feet (doubled if tunneling).

notes: Can spend 32 P.P.E. to make the structure permanent.

name: Eavesdrop
description: Hearing becomes equivalent to a parabolic listening device, focusing on a target and blocking out background noise. Can hear through thin walls.
notes: Does not provide translation. Target must be visible.

name: Encryption
description: Automatically encrypts any form of communication. Writing appears as symbols, speech sounds like nonsense, and surface thoughts are scrambled against telepathy.
notes: Defeated only by magical translation (Tongues, Eyes of Thoth) or Cryptography at -40%.

name: Fear No Evil
description: Renders the user immune to the effects of Horror Factor and temporary fear caused by Phobias.

enhancement.summary: 4 P.P.E. per additional minute

name: Flurry
description: Grants preternatural combat speed, raining down blows upon opponents.

incompatibleWith: Other talents that provide bonus attacks

opponentConditionalModifiers.summary: Additional +1 to combat stats against Nightlords, Night Princes, Greater Demons, or dark gods.

name: Form-Lock
description: Traps a shape-changing being in its current physical form. Prevents transformation via natural, magical, or other means.

enhancement.summary: 20 P.P.E. per additional minute.

rangeMechanics.summary: Line of sight up to 500 feet.

name: Frightener
description: Increases the terrifying nature of the character, imposing a Horror Factor or increasing an existing Awe/Horror Factor. The exact visual changes are magical illusions.

cannotAffect: allies who know the character and this Talent (unless fighting/restraining)

enhancement.summary: 2 P.P.E. per +1 bonus to Horror Factor desired, up to a maximum Horror Factor of 15.

range.distance: Self; affects others seeing the character up to 90 feet + 10 feet per level of experience.

notes: Maximum Horror Factor possible is 15.

name: Ghost Tag
description: Leaves spectral messages by means of words or images that only Nightbane, Guardians, Astral Travelers, and beings who can See the Invisible can read.

name: Gunslinger
description: Enhances firearms abilities and grants preternatural shooting accuracy.

name: Hotwire
description: Allows the Nightbane to start electronic vehicles without a key or bypass electronic systems.

name: Hound Leash
description: Magical control or restriction of Hound tracking abilities.

name: Hyper-Awareness
description: Heightens combat senses and reaction times, providing initiative and defensive bonuses.

name: Ignorance is Bliss
description: Erases the memory of recent events from the minds of targets, acting proactively or retroactively.

name: Inferno Fist
description: Ignites the character's hand in flames, allowing for devastating melee strikes that do not harm the character or held weapons.

limitations.otherLimitations: Will not work in conjunction with a weapon. Only 2 P.P.E. may be spent on the activation of this Talent per level of the Nightbane's experience.

notes: If not used by the end of the melee round or if the Nightbane is knocked unconscious, the fire extinguishes.

name: Iron Will
description: Strengthens the mind's natural defenses against psychic and magical manipulation.
notes: Negates skill performance penalties for being under duress or under fire. The Nightbane will know when psionic powers are being used against him and that something is trying to breach his mental defenses.

name: Jam Senses
description: Fouls the supernatural tracking senses of Hounds and their ilk, robbing them of their ability to track the supernatural and their immunity to illusions.

limitations.otherLimitations: Must have previously encountered a Hound or Hunter before selecting. Affects a single target per level of experience.

savingThrow.consequenceOfFailure: Temporarily robbed of supernatural tracking senses, immunity to illusions/concealment, and suffers -1 to initiative, strike, parry, and dodge.

name: Killing Spree
description: A dark ability that fuels the Nightbane with the stolen energy of slain victims, succumbing to violent impulses.

name: Launch
description: Allows the user to telekinetically hurl a single visible object at a visible target.

limitations.otherLimitations: Only ONE object can be hurled at a time. Fine manipulation or holding an object suspended is not possible. Requires a gesture.

range.distance: 50 feet + 20 feet per level of experience.

statusEffects.summary: 33% chance of knocking down a human-sized opponent if weight is greater than 30 lbs. Target loses initiative and 1 attack.

notes: Weapons flung point or blade first inflict normal damage +1D6. Objects under 20 lbs can be parried (-2 penalty); larger must be dodged (-1 penalty). Each Launch counts as one of the Talent user's melee attacks.

name: Leap
description: Grants enhanced jumping capabilities and the intuitive ability to judge distance precisely.

jumpDistanceScaling.summary: Allows for drastically increased leaping distance.

name: Leave No Trace
description: Erases the physical presence and tracks of the Nightbane and their companions, making tracking via scent or footprints impossible.

enhancement.summary: Can affect an area larger than the base 10 foot radius.
enhancement.stepDefinition: +10 feet (3 m) to the radius of effect

limitations.otherLimitations: Can be used in Facade form to cover the Nightbane's own tracks, but to bestow the benefit on others, the Morphus form must be used. It does not erase physical damage (broken twigs, smashed doors, etc.), but obscures tracks and scent trails.

ranges.summary: Self, plus 10 foot (3 m) radius

notes: Electronic surveillance is also affected: cameras show blurry images and microphones pick up static for the duration. Trackers relying on footprints or scent automatically fail while this is active.

name: Livewire
description: Animates lengths of wire or cable to entangle, whip, and electrocute enemies.

activationTiers.name: Light Cable
activationTiers.effectDescription: Animates light wire (lamp cords, speaker wire). Wire has ~10 S.D.C. per foot. Whip attacks inflict 1D6 damage. If electrically charged, adds +1D4 damage and has a 01-33% chance to stun opponent for 1D4 melee rounds. Break free requires Supernatural P.S. of 20 and uses two attacks.

activationTiers.name: High-Gauge Cable
activationTiers.effectDescription: Animates medium wire (jumper cables, extension cords). Wire has ~20 S.D.C. per foot. Whip attacks inflict 2D6 damage. If electrically charged, adds +1D6 damage and has a 01-50% chance to stun opponent for 2D4 melee rounds. Break free requires Supernatural P.S. of 30 and uses two attacks.

activationTiers.name: Heavy-Duty Cable
activationTiers.effectDescription: Animates heavy wire (transmission lines, mooring cables). Wire has ~50 S.D.C. per foot. Whip attacks inflict 3D6 damage. If electrically charged, adds +1D6 damage and has a 01-66% chance to stun opponent for 2D4 melee rounds. Break free requires Supernatural P.S. of 40 and uses three attacks.

limitations.otherLimitations: Must be able to clearly see both the wire and the intended target, or know their exact location. Stun chance and duration are reduced by half against supernatural opponents.

ranges.summary: Animates a 20 foot (6.1 m) length of wire/cable up to 100 feet (30.5 m) away.

duration.summary: 30 seconds (2 melees) per level of experience

save.summary: Save vs electricity 13 or higher (P.E. bonus applies) reduces damage by half and prevents stun.

name: Mage Siphon
description: Enables the Nightbane to steal P.P.E. from other beings.

enhancement.summary: Spend additional P.P.E. to steal more P.P.E.

maxEnhancementPpePerActivation.notes: Only two P.P.E. points per level of experience may be spent on each use (e.g. 1 pt = 1D6 stolen, 2 pts = 2D6 stolen).

ranges.summary: Within 10 feet (3 m) per level of experience; line of sight required

save.summary: Save vs magic 14 to prevent P.P.E. drain

effectsOnSuccessfulSave.notes: Target prevents energy from being siphoned away.

vampiricResourceRecovery.triggerSummary: On a successful activation where the target fails their save.

name: Mass Transit
description: Temporarily absorbs willing passengers into the Nightbane's own body for covert transport.

enhancement.summary: Can absorb additional passengers for 15 P.P.E. each.

limitations.otherLimitations: Can only be used on willing subjects. Any damage to the Nightbane is also taken as full damage by each passenger (S.D.C. first, then H.P.). Nightbane's weight increases by 10% per passenger.

ranges.summary: Touch

passengerCompanionCapacity.summary: Can absorb any number of willing subjects provided P.P.E. is paid.

notes: Passengers enter a state of suspended animation, requiring no food or water, and are unaware of the passage of time.

name: Mimic Spell
description: Captures and copies a recently cast spell by expending P.P.E. to reactivate the spell's lingering echo.

baseActivation.relativeToSummary: 10 P.P.E. PLUS the usual P.P.E. cost required to cast the spell being mimicked.
baseActivation.notes: Total activation cost is 10 + the spell's base cost.

limitations.otherLimitations: Magic-using Nightbane can select at 2nd level. Cannot mimic rituals or spells requiring physical/spiritual components unless the user possesses them. Only mimics the last spell cast in a specific area.
cannotAffect: Spells cast more than 6 minutes ago

ranges.summary: Can recreate a spell cast within 200 feet (61 m)

activationTime.summary: The mimicked spell must be cast within one melee round (15 seconds) or it is gone.

duration.summary: Duration of the mimicked spell is the same as the original unless deliberately altered.

notes: The range, duration, damage, and effects are the same as the original, though the Mimic can adjust it within the usual parameters of the spell.

name: Mimic Talent
description: Duplicates the effects of almost any other Nightbane Talent witnessed within 100 feet.

baseActivation.relativeToSummary: 10 P.P.E. PLUS the usual P.P.E. costs required to use the Talent being mimicked.
baseActivation.notes: Total activation cost is 10 + the mimicked Talent's cost.

limitations.otherLimitations: Must meet all requirements of the copied Talent (level, morphus restrictions, HP/PE loss, etc.). Can only duplicate the last Talent the user witnessed with their own eyes. Must be mimicked within 60 seconds (four melee rounds) after witnessing.

ranges.summary: Must witness the Talent within 100 feet (30.5 m). Range of the copied Talent is roughly the same as observed.

activationTime.summary: Instantly available to the user after witnessing.

duration.summary: Half the duration of the mimicked Talent.

notes: The mimicked Talent is used once and cannot be duplicated again unless witnessed again. Retains the power level and capabilities of the original user, NOT the mimicking Nightbane's level.

name: Mirror Sense
description: Senses the presence of any mirrors in the vicinity that have a connection to the Nightlands.

limitations.otherLimitations: Only detects mirrors connected to the Nightlands, not other dimensional portals or anomalies.

ranges.summary: 500 foot (152.4 m) radius + 100 feet (30.5 m) per level of experience

duration.summary: Five minutes per level of experience

notes: Reveals exactly how many mirrors there are, their direction, and distance. Concentrating on a mirror reveals a blurry, shadowy image of the room's reflection in the Nightlands.

name: Mirror Shield
description: Summons a protective mirrored shield capable of deflecting physical, energy, and magical projectile attacks.

limitations.otherLimitations: Remains on the user's arm/hand and cannot be dropped or passed. Can be canceled at any time.

ranges.summary: Self

duration.summary: 10 minutes per level of experience or until destroyed

createdObjects.name: Mirrored Shield
createdObjects.damageRules: Only takes damage if specifically targeted. Can parry energy and magical projectile attacks without normal penalties. Parried attacks may hit nearby objects/people for half damage.

parry.summary: +3 to parry while using the shield.

name: Nega
description: Interrupts and negates an incoming spell or Talent targeting the Nightbane by spending equivalent P.P.E.

baseActivation.relativeToSummary: Requires the Nightbane to spend the same amount of P.P.E. as the spell or Talent directed at them.

limitations.otherLimitations: Must be able to see the incoming attack (invisible attacks or attacks from behind cannot be negated). Does not work on true psionic attacks (I.S.P.).

ranges.summary: Self; or up to two other people by touch

notes: Can be applied to up to two other people simultaneously by touching them, negating the spell on two people for the P.P.E. cost of one.

name: Open Channel
description: Senses the presence of a specific species of supernatural being, while simultaneously alerting those beings to the Nightbane's presence.

limitations.otherLimitations: Does not indicate exact location or numbers, only rough groupings (one or two, a few, several, many, great many). To sense a different species, must be reactivated. Practitioners of magic and psychics are NOT sensed.

ranges.summary: 100 feet (30.5 m) per level of experience

duration.summary: One minute per level of experience

notes: Every targeted individual inside the radius ALSO senses the Nightbane's presence.

name: Phantom Limb
description: Summons translucent, ghostly extra appendages that function as additional limbs.

enhancement.summary: Summon additional limbs.

limitations.otherLimitations: Can summon one limb per 3 levels of experience (1 at level three, 2 at six, 3 at nine, 4 at 12, 5 at 15). If meant for complex tasks like shooting, they must have digits and opposable thumbs.

ranges.summary: Self

duration.summary: One minute (4 melee rounds) per level of experience

stepScaling.summary: +1 to parry and entangle per summoned limb.

createdObjects.name: Phantom Limb
createdObjects.damageRules: Has Supernatural P.S. of 16. Normal hand to hand strikes deal 1D6 damage.

name: Pipe Bomb
description: Forms a shell of dark energy that absorbs incoming damage, but can be discharged on an opponent for explosive harm.

enhancement.summary: Scales shield S.D.C. and explosive payload.

limitations.otherLimitations: Can only strike opponents touched via a melee punch.

ranges.summary: Self / Touch (Punch)

duration.summary: Until discharged, or one minute per level of experience

createdObjects.name: Pipe Bomb Shield

offensiveDamageScalingByPpeStep.stepDefinition: Each 2 P.P.E. adds 10 S.D.C. to the shield and +1D6+1 to the explosive blast.

createdObjects.damageRules: Damage from incoming attacks is absorbed by the shield's S.D.C. first. Discharge damage ignores any damage already taken by the shield.

name: Pocket Change
description: Conjures actual physical currency out of thin air that vanishes after a limited time.

enhancement.summary: Creates additional currency.

limitations.otherLimitations: Must picture the exact currency to create and be familiar with its appearance. Money vanishes completely when duration ends.

ranges.summary: Self

name: Raven Wings
description: Manifests large black wings of solid shadow to grant magically powered flight.

enhancement.summary: Extends flight time.

limitations.otherLimitations: No altitude limit, but air gets too thin to breathe around 20,000 feet (6,096 m). Flight speed limited to 20 mph (32 kph) per level of experience. Means of flight has no physical substance and cannot be damaged.

ranges.summary: Self

name: Reality Mooring
description: Forces incorporeal beings to manifest physically or retreat, and prevents astral projection or becoming intangible within its area of effect.

ranges.summary: 15 feet (4.6 m) radius per level of experience

save.summary: 16 or better to save vs magic to prevent being forced to manifest on the physical plane or vanish.

statusEffects.summary: Incorporeal beings that fail the save are forced to become physical or retreat to their home plane. If forced physical, they suffer penalties.

name: Skill Stealer
description: Temporarily robs another sentient being of a single skill and transfers that knowledge to the Nightbane.

cannotAffect: Animals or monsters with instincts and innate abilities
limitations.otherLimitations: Only a single skill can be stolen per use. Cannot steal combat bonuses associated with physical skills or Weapon Proficiencies; only the base skill knowledge is gained.

ranges.summary: Touch or up to 40 feet (12.2 m) away; line of sight required

save.summary: Save vs magic 14 or better to resist having the skill stolen.

effectsOnSuccessfulSave.notes: Target retains their skill and the Nightbane gains nothing.

notes: Grants the user the stolen skill at the victim's exact percentage of success. If the Nightbane already knows the skill, they may use the higher of the two percentages.

name: Sky Writer
description: Manipulates clouds to write messages, block light, or create dramatic tinting and artwork in the sky.

enhancement.summary: Cost varies based on the desired cloud manipulation effect. Double all P.P.E. costs if clouds must be conjured out of thin air.
enhancement.stepDefinition: 1 P.P.E. per 6 letters/symbols; 5 P.P.E. to shift cloud position; 10 P.P.E. to darken/tint clouds.

ranges.summary: Can affect any cloud within a 5 mile (8 km) radius.

duration.summary: Two minutes (8 melee rounds) per level of experience.

name: Solar Flare
description: Summons a small orb of magical sunlight that can be used as a lantern, fired as a damaging bolt, or launched into the sky to create a blinding flash.

enhancement.summary: When fired into the air as a flash, each 4 P.P.E. adds 2D6 damage to creatures vulnerable to sunlight.

ranges.summary: As a lantern: 5 foot (1.5 m) radius. When fired/launched: up to 1,000 feet (305 m).

duration.summary: Lantern mode lasts 1 melee round (15 seconds) per level. Instant when fired or launched.

notes: Laser bolt does double damage to vampires and Shadow creatures. The aerial flash lights up a 1,000 foot diameter, inflicting area damage to sunlight-vulnerable creatures within 100 feet and causing a Horror Factor of 12 to them.

name: Switchboard Operator
description: Acts as a supernatural communications hub, creating an undetectable, short-range telepathic network between willing participants.

enhancement.summary: Extend duration by 10 minutes.

cannotAffect: Those shielded by Mind Block or Anti-Magic Cloud
limitations.otherLimitations: Can use no other Talents while this is active. Participants must speak aloud (even a whisper) to be heard.

ranges.summary: 1,000 foot (305 m) radius per level of experience.

duration.summary: 10 minutes for 4 P.P.E., extendable by 2 P.P.E. per additional 10 minutes.

activationRequirements.summary: Connecting more than 6 people causes severe penalties to the Nightbane. Connecting 8 or more causes penalties to all participants.
activationRequirements.circumstance: Situational network overload based on participant count.

physicalBonusesPenalties.notes: If 7+ participants: Nightbane suffers 0 Perception bonuses, -4 initiative, -4 all combat rolls, -2 melee attacks, -40% skill performance. If 8+ participants: EVERYONE suffers 0 Perception bonuses, -2 initiative, -2 combat rolls, -1 melee attack, -20% skill performance.

name: Trap Shadow
description: Converts an ordinary patch of shadow into a booby-trap that lashes out at enemies, grabbing and holding them.

ranges.summary: Trap reach is a 1 foot (0.3 m) radius per level. Can be triggered remotely up to 100 feet (30.5 m) per level.

duration.summary: Remains set for 10 minutes per level. Once triggered, it holds victims for 1 melee round per level.

notes: Victims dragged into the shadow are heavily cloaked in darkness and temporarily removed from play. A strong, bright light destroys the Trap Shadow after 1D6+1 minutes.

name: Ultra-Vision
description: Grants the ability to see in several spectrums of light, plus telescopic and microscopic vision.

enhancement.summary: Extend duration.

ranges.summary: 2 feet for microscopic/X-ray; standard for infrared/ultraviolet; up to 2 miles for telescopic vision.

name: Wall Runner
description: Allows the Nightbane to defy gravity and move up or across vertical surfaces as if they were flat ground.

enhancement.summary: Extend duration.

limitations.otherLimitations: If contact with the vertical surface is lost, the defiance of gravity ends and the user will fall.

ranges.summary: Self

notes: Opponents fighting the Wall Runner at a 90-degree angle are at a disadvantage, suffering -3 to strike, parry, and dodge.

name: Wall Whisperer
description: Allows the user to 'read' the memories of a wall or building section, witnessing past events that occurred within its vicinity.

cannotAffect: Areas protected by the Sanctum spell

ranges.summary: Touch activation. Covers 20 feet (6.1 m) on both sides of a 20-foot wall length, +10 feet (3 m) per level.

duration.summary: Max of one hour to review memories per activation.

save.summary: Nightbane must save vs psionic attack 17 or better to avoid being forced to relive highly traumatic events recorded by the wall.

notes: The Talent user falls into a trance while reading the wall and may lose track of time.

name: Witch-Hunter's Sight
description: Enables the Nightbane to see P.P.E. as a bluish glow, spotting magical beings, items, and ley lines.

cannotAffect: Non-magical objects and beings with less than 12 P.P.E.

ranges.summary: Equal to the Nightbane's natural nightvision range.

duration.summary: One minute per level of experience.

save.summary: +4 to save versus illusion while active.

physicalBonusesPenalties.notes: User suffers -3 to all Perception Rolls while active. Looking at targets with 500+ P.P.E. causes -4 to all combat rolls against that target. Looking at 1,000+ P.P.E. causes blindness, resulting in -8 to all combat rolls.

name: Beguiling Beauty
description: Upon activating this Talent, the unnatural good looks of the user become, quite literally, stunning. Anyone who looks directly at the Beguiling Beauty must make a save vs magic roll of 12 or higher. Any person who saves is unaffected, but those who fail are awestruck at the mere sight of the Nightbane and blissfully unaware of anything other than the character's beauty and what she or he is doing.

ranges.summary: 8 foot (2.4 m) radius per level of the Nightbane's experience

duration.summary: Trance lasts for 1 minute (4 melee rounds) after the Talent lapses or the affected person is no longer within range.

save.summary: Save vs magic 12 or higher
save.effectsOnSuccessfulSave: Opponents not beguiled are still a bit distracted by the Beguiling Beauty and are -1 on all combat rolls and -5% on the performance of skills.

notes: Any hostile or aggressive action on the part of the Nightbane who is the Beguiling Beauty immediately cancels this Talent's effects.

name: Beyond the Call
description: Channel magical energy to accomplish astonishing results by temporarily boosting one of several traits to a superhuman level.

ranges.summary: Self only

name: Choke
description: Enables the Nightbane to cause opponents to suddenly fail the next action he takes. Whether it is a combat roll to strike, parry, dodge, etc., a Perception Roll, a saving throw, skill roll, etc., the opponent who fails to save vs magic automatically fails his next action and suffers the consequences for it (if any).

ranges.summary: 100 feet (30.5 m) per level of experience and the target must be visible; line of sight.

duration.summary: Affects only the next action of a one specific character

save.summary: Save vs magic 15 or better to save

notes: Targets who do save are not impacted by this magic.

name: Contortionist
description: A brutal yet effective means of attacking and debilitating opponents, this Talent enables the user to violently manipulate the limbs of his victims. Upon activating Contortionist, the Nightbane dislocates one of his or her own limbs or digits. The target of the Talent then must attempt to save vs magic of 12 or better. If the save is unsuccessful, an arm, leg, tentacle, etc., is twisted and contorted out of socket.

activationDamage.notes: The Nightbane dislocates one of his or her own limbs or digits.

ranges.summary: Touch or four feet (1.2 m) away; line of sight.

duration.summary: Instant. Penalties last until a successful First Aid or higher medical skill is used to reset the limb in the socket or damage is regenerated/healed.

save.summary: Save vs magic 12 or better
save.effectsOnFailedSave: An arm, leg, tentacle, etc., is twisted and contorted out of socket. This attack does 2D6 damage and inhibits the use of that limb. Causes most ordinary human victims to pass out for 1D4 melee rounds unless they save vs pain at 14 or better.

penaltiesOnAffectedCharacters.notes: Losing the use of one arm imposes a -3 penalty to strike, parry, disarm, and entangle, as well as preventing the use of weapons or tools with that limb.

name: Corrupting Influence
description: Temporarily turning the Talent user into the archetypical 'silver-tongued devil,' the Corrupting Influence Talent makes victims more susceptible to suggestions relating to their darker nature. Such suggestions might play to a target's greed, jealousy, anger, lust for revenge, etc.

limitations.otherLimitations: The Nightbane's own alignment must be Anarchist or evil. Those affected by this Talent can NOT be made to seriously injure themselves or a loved one.

ranges.summary: Touch or 10 feet (3 m) and must be able to hear the Talent user speak.

duration.summary: The Talent is only good for a single suggestion per use.

save.summary: Save vs magic; Good 12, Selfish 14, Evil 16

notes: If the Talent user or a recognized ally attacks a person under the sway of Corrupting Influence, its effects are immediately negated the moment after the deed is done.

name: Dark Dreams
description: Has a handful of different uses involving nightmares and the manipulation of dreams. First, it can be used on a sleeping target to attempt to impose a nightmare. It can also be used to orchestrate a nightmare from within a Dream Pool and engage in dream combat.

save.summary: Save against nightmare's Horror Factor
save.effectsOnFailedSave: Awaken within 1D4 melee rounds feeling robbed of any sleep previously attained - no restored Hit Points, S.D.C. or P.P.E. or I.S.P.

name: Dark Fathom
description: Summons the suffocating and terrifyingly cold abyss of the deep ocean. It creates a localized sphere of pitch-black water. Everything within the area is completely submersed in absolute darkness.

enhancement.summary: 4 P.P.E. for every additional minute sustained.

ranges.summary: Up to 100 feet (30.5 m) away +10 feet (3 m) per level of experience.

areaOfEffect.summary: 20 foot (6.1 m) radius per level of experience.

duration.summary: See cost; hypothermia penalties last for 3D6x10 minutes after drying off.

penaltiesOnAffectedCharacters.notes: Hypothermia penalties kick in within 1D4 minutes.

name: Diamond-Hide
description: Used to greatly increase the Talent user's resistance to damage for a time, turning them into a supernatural juggernaut capable of shrugging off a hail of attacks. The skin of the user takes on a sheen like a rough-cut gemstone or volcanic glass.

enhancement.summary: Five P.P.E. per each point of Natural A.R. added.

limitations.otherLimitations: Maximum boost allowed is limited to 2 A.R. points per level of the Nightbane up to a cap of A.R. 18. Magical and psionic attacks ignore any boost provided by Diamond-Hide.

ranges.summary: Self only

name: Divine Wrath
description: In an impressive display of supernatural power, the user of Divine Wrath appears to call down devastating retribution on anyone unfortunate enough to be in the area of effect. The Nightbane becomes wreathed in a halo of light or fire, and appears to float weightlessly into the air.

limitations.otherLimitations: Can only be used once every four melee rounds (60 seconds). Uses up ALL the Nightbane's attacks.

ranges.summary: Up to 500 feet (152.4 m) away +50 feet (15.2 m) per level of experience.

areaOfEffect.summary: 10 foot (3 m) diameter of effect per level of experience

bonusDamageVsNightlandsDenizens.summary: Triple damage against demons, Nightlords, their avatars and all evil creatures from the Nightlands!

notes: Double the damage to supernatural beings and magical creatures. The Talent user is +5 to strike with this onslaught, but only rolls once per melee attack.

name: Epic Proportions
description: Enables the Nightbane to temporarily grow to a massive size, up to 30 feet (9.1 m).

enhancement.summary: Fifteen P.P.E. per 10 feet (3 m) of additional height.

mutuallyExclusive.summary: No other Talent may be used by the character while Epic Proportions is in effect.

ranges.summary: Self

duration.summary: One minute (4 melee rounds) per level of experience.

physicalCombatStatModifiers.notes: Temporarily double the Talent-user's weight and add 100 S.D.C. per every 10 feet (3 m) of height. Horror Factor is increased by one point per each 10 feet of height up to a maximum of 18.

name: Fan Club
description: Draws strength from an ethereal fan club, generating P.P.E. from the focus and emotions of teammates or bystanders rooting for him.

ranges.summary: Self, or other by touch.

duration.summary: 1D4 melee rounds +1 melee round per level of experience.

temporaryResourcePools.summary: Provides an extra 2D6+15 P.P.E. available to use for other Talents or spells.

name: Ghost Ship
description: Gives the user the ability to summon a supernatural conveyance in the form of a large, ghostly sailing vessel. It floats silently through the air, functioning on dry land as well as over water.

enhancement.summary: Thirty P.P.E. for every additional 20 minutes of travel.

limitations.otherLimitations: The user must remain onboard the ship at all times. If he leaves the ship the Talent is cancelled and the vessel vanishes.

ranges.summary: Self

duration.summary: 20 minutes per 30 P.P.E. expended, but the Talent may be sustained for three times as long when on a ley line.

createdObjects.name: Ghostly Sailing Vessel
createdObjects.sdc: 50 S.D.C. per level of the Talent user

environmentalAmplifiers.environmentSummary: Ley line or ley line triangle
environmentalAmplifiers.effectSummary: Sustained for three times as long; top speed increased to 90 mph.

name: Hatred's Mirror
description: Turning aside any attack born of anger, hatred, or other ill intent. Any opponent with foul motives who attacks the Talent user will discover the true price of hatred as the damage that would normally be dealt to his victim is instead inflicted upon the aggressor!

limitations.otherLimitations: Only malicious attacks are redirected. The Talent user cannot make any kind of attack against anyone while this Talent is active or it is immediately canceled.

ranges.summary: Self

reflectionMechanics.triggerCondition: Any attack born of anger, hatred, or other ill intent directed at the user.
reflectionMechanics.notes: If the attack has an area of effect it centers on the person who launched it.

name: Hysterical
description: Enables a Nightbane to imbue an object or himself with the ability to cause uncontrolled bouts of hysterical laughter in others.

limitations.otherLimitations: Victims can only be affected by this Talent one time per 12 hour period. Only works on intelligent beings with a relatively human sense of humor.

ranges.summary: Self or an object/prop up to 10 feet (3 m) away. The power then affects anyone that sees or hears the humor.

duration.summary: The power can be activated and remain latent for up to one day per level of the Talent user. Once the power becomes active, it can affect people for 5D6 minutes. Penalties last 1D6 minutes +1 minute per level.

save.summary: Save vs magic 15 or higher
save.effectsOnFailedSave: A laughing fit causing loss of motor control, pain in the chest and throat, and difficulty breathing.

penaltiesOnAffectedCharacters.notes: If attacked by the Talent user, the hysterical person is unable to defend against his first attack because he is laughing too hard.

name: Legionnaire
description: Gain the ability to create shadowy copies of themselves to help even the odds when outnumbered. These copies act on their own to defend the user or follow simple commands.

durationPerActivation.summary: 15 P.P.E. per each individual copy created.

limitations.otherLimitations: Copies are unable to speak, cast spells, or activate Talents. For every pair of copies created, subtract one melee attack/action from the user.

ranges.summary: The copies must stay within 10 feet (3 m) per level of experience of the user.

duration.summary: One minute at level 5, +1 minute for each subsequent level.

createdObjects.name: Shadow Copy
createdObjects.notes: Copies have half the Talent user's combat bonuses, half the number of attacks, skills at half ability, and P.S. reduced by half (minimum 10). No Hit Points. Prowl at 70% in shadows.

name: Living Nightmare
description: Upon activating this Talent, the Nightbane becomes the epitome of fear. The Talent user appears to change into whatever it is each individual fears most.

ranges.summary: Self, but targets are affected up to 20 feet (6.1 m) away per level of experience.

duration.summary: 30 seconds (2 melee rounds) per level of experience.

save.summary: Save vs magic or illusion of 14 or higher to resist seeing the nightmare; then save against Horror Factor.
save.effectsOnFailedSave: Victim must save vs Horror Factor 14+1D4 without bonuses. If failed, the victim flees.

notes: Unlike normal Horror Factor, the first attack directed at the terrified victim does NOT automatically succeed; those affected are +3 to dodge the Nightbane.

name: Master Stroke
description: Enables the Talent user to boost the performance of any one skill to phenomenal quality if so desired. The worker focuses entirely on the task at breakneck speed.

enhancement.summary: One P.P.E. per percentage point of the skill bonus imposed.

limitations.otherLimitations: Maximum bonus is +5% per level of the Talent user. Does not work on combat skills. Anyone other than the user can only be affected once per day.

ranges.summary: Self, or other by touch.

penaltiesOnAffectedCharacters.notes: If roused from the task, have half attacks and no combat bonuses. The heightened state is exhausting. Risk of psychological addiction on repeated use.

name: Mystic Amplifier
description: Increases the P.P.E reserve of the Nightbane for a limited duration. Upon activation, the user's remaining P.P.E. is doubled. This additional P.P.E. is freely available to anyone within range.

enhancement.summary: Ten P.P.E. per 50% P.P.E. bonus.

limitations.otherLimitations: Maximum P.P.E. amplification possible is 150%.

ranges.summary: Self, but the added P.P.E. can be drawn on at twice the normal distance.

areaOfEffect.summary: Magic amplification affects a 50 foot (15.2 m) radius per 50% P.P.E. bonus.

duration.summary: 1D4 melees, +1 melee round per level of experience.

notes: The Nightbane becomes a transitional place of power that increases range and duration of incantations 50% by any spell caster within 20 feet (6.1 m). Sensitive beings can track the user from an additional 500 feet (152 m) away.

name: Nature's Fury
description: Calls on the awesome power of nature to carve a swath of devastation by creating localized natural disasters. Options include blizzards, earthquakes, landslides, and flash floods.

limitations.otherLimitations: The type of disaster created must make sense for the area affected. Activating requires a 1D4 minute trance. No effect on the Astral Plane or Dreamstream.

ranges.summary: Localized to a primary 1/2 mile (0.8 km) radius, secondary effects felt for an additional 1D4 miles (1.6-6.4 km).

notes: Damage varies greatly by the disaster invoked. The Nightbane is immune to the destruction.

name: Necrosis
description: Inflicts grievous damage on living flesh by accelerating the natural processes of decay. The target must have unhealed wounds or a stigmata.

enhancement.summary: Every two P.P.E. points spent inflicts 1D6 damage.

limitations.otherLimitations: Maximum damage is 1D6x10 (or 10D6). A wound may only be affected once by this Talent.

ranges.summary: Touch or up to 10 feet (3.1 m) per level of experience; line of sight required.

duration.summary: Instant effect and damage with lingering penalties.

save.summary: Save vs magic of 15 or greater to resist full necrosis.
save.effectsOnFailedSave: Full damage. Feverish: -2 attacks, reduce combat bonuses, Spd, and skills by half for 1D6 melees. Healing/regeneration shuts off for 5 minutes per level.
save.effectsOnSuccessfulSave: No damage, but -1 on all combat rolls and -5% on skill performance for 1D6 melee rounds.

name: No Rest
description: Eliminates the effects of sleep deprivation for the user or can be used offensively to completely prevent an unwilling target from sleeping, leading to severe penalties and eventual insanity.

enhancement.summary: +3 extra P.P.E. to raise the saving throw by one point (max 15).
enhancement.stepDefinition: +1 to the target's saving throw difficulty

ranges.summary: Self and one other by touch with good intentions. Touch or 30 feet (9.1 m) when used on one victim as an attack.

save.summary: Save vs magic of 14 or better
save.effectsOnFailedSave: Target cannot sleep. Accumulated sleep deprivation penalties apply.

name: Overdrive
description: Drastically increases the maximum speed of the user or a means of conveyance up to 500 mph (800 kph). The Morphus often reconfigures to a more aerodynamic shape or develops thrusters.

enhancement.summary: 16 P.P.E. per 100 miles, +8 P.P.E. per additional 100 miles. Doubled for vehicles with passengers; tripled for large vehicles.

limitations.otherLimitations: Combat is largely impossible outside of dodging, firing ahead, or ramming. Must travel at 500 mph or normal speed.

ranges.summary: Self, riding animal or vehicle by touch.

physicalCombatStatModifiers.notes: +30% to appropriate Piloting skill and reduce penalties for high-speed maneuvers by half.

name: Pariah's Mantle
description: Draws the ire and hatred of others, causing those affected to hurl insults and launch physical assaults on the user, creating a major distraction.

limitations.otherLimitations: Anyone affected by this Talent that is harmed in any way is immediately released and immune for 24 hours.

ranges.summary: 20 feet (6.1 m), +5 feet (1.5 m) per level of experience.

save.summary: Save vs magic 15 or better (Good alignments +2 to save, Pacifists +5)
save.effectsOnFailedSave: Overcome with revulsion and violent hatred; engages in physical assaults within 1D4 melee rounds.

name: Passing the Torch
description: This is the extraordinary ability to turn ordinary individuals into Nightbane permanently. This is a deathbed sacrifice that kills the Nightbane Talent user.

attributeCost.yieldSummary: Permanently transforms an ordinary individual into a Nightbane.
attributeCost.notes: Using this ability to permanently pass the torch kills the Nightbane Talent user. Allows someone else to operate in his Morphus for 12 P.P.E. per hour.

ranges.summary: Touch or 10 feet

name: Payday
description: Similar to the Pocket Change Talent, Payday allows the Nightbane to conjure money. Ten physical dollars appears in hand for every one P.P.E. spent.

limitations.otherLimitations: Since the Nightbane must picture the currency...

ranges.summary: Self

duration.summary: One hour per level of experience

createdObjects.name: Physical Currency
createdObjects.summary: Ten physical dollars appears in hand for every one P.P.E. spent.

name: Rallying Cry
description: Expends P.P.E. to allow allies to roll another saving throw.

ppe.notes: Expend double the usual amount of P.P.E.

ranges.summary: 10 foot radius per level

retroactiveSaveGrants.versusPreExistingEffectSummary: Allows a reroll against an existing condition.

name: Revolting Spit
description: Secrete a mild organic acid in the mouth that can be held and delivered via a bite attack or spit at an enemy.

cannotAffect: Inorganic material like glass, ceramics, crystal, stone, plastic and metal
Nightbane in full environmental suit or armor
Elementals, Flint People, Hounds and Hunters
limitations.otherLimitations: Water completely neutralizes the acid.

rangeAndArea.rangeSummary: Bite or 10 feet (3.1 m) per level of experience.

duration.durationSummary: Instant attack. Damage and penalties last for 1D4 melee rounds or until washed away.

attacksAndDamage.baseDamageSummary: 1D4 damage initially, plus +1 point of additional damage per each of the next 1D4 melee rounds. Double damage to Nightlords, their minions, and Denizens of the Nightlands. Double damage (half direct to HP) on exposed cuts or vulnerable tissue.
attacksAndDamage.actionCost: Counts as two melee attacks (one to conjure, one to bite or spit).

savingThrows.bonusToSaveSummary: A Called Shot of 14 or better (Natural, unmodified roll) is required to hit the face and impose blindness.

statusAlterations.summary: If hit in the face and victim saves: Eyes water and fumes make breathing difficult. -1 melee attack, -1 to all combat rolls, -2 on Perception Rolls, and -10% to all skills.

If hit in the face and victim fails to save: Temporarily blinded and overwhelmed by noxious fumes. -10 to all combat rolls, -80% to touch-based skills (0% if sight is required). Additionally, fumes cause -2 melee attacks, -2 to all combat rolls, -2 on Perception Rolls, and -20% to skill performance.

name: Rigor Mortis
description: Mimics the effects of rigor mortis, the stiffening of muscle tissue after death. Can be used to feign death or debilitate an opponent.

duration.durationSummary: One hour per level of experience.

statusAlterations.summary: Appears completely dead. Heartbeat and breathing stop, temperature cools. Uses 5% of normal oxygen, requires no food/water, ceases metabolizing drugs/poison. Still able to see, hear, and smell. Can be canceled at any time.

enhancement.summary: Every 5 P.P.E. imposes a -20% penalty, up to a maximum of 80%.
enhancement.stepDefinition: -20% penalty to physical stats and actions

rangeAndArea.rangeSummary: Touch or up to 20 feet (6.1 m) + 5 feet (1.5 m) per level of experience.

duration.durationSummary: One minute per level of experience.

statusAlterations.summary: Reduces P.S., P.P., Spd, attacks per melee, combat bonuses, and skill performance by 20-80% based on P.P.E. spent.

name: Seedling
description: Allows the user to plant a seed imbued with a fragment of their life essence. It grows into a tree reflecting their Morphus form, extending their lifespan and serving as a safe haven and P.P.E. battery.

limitations.otherLimitations: Only ONE seedling can be planted for the lifetime of the Nightbane. Must be in Morphus form to plant; subsequent abilities usable in Facade or Morphus.

duration.durationSummary: Lives for decades or until destroyed. The tree lives 1D6x10 years after the Nightbane dies.

comaHitPointBuffer.summary: Provides 1D6+1 extra Hit Points per level of experience that are secretly added to the Nightbane's total when dropping below zero.
comaHitPointBuffer.durationWhenTriggered: Remains in a healing coma state until regenerated to 1D6+10 Hit Points above zero.

statusAlterations.summary: Lifespan extended by 1D6x10+60 years. +30% to save vs coma/death. Can breathe without air for 2 minutes per P.E. attribute point. Immune to carbon dioxide.

createdObjects.objectSummary: A magical tree tied to the creator's essence.

growthStages.growthStageSummary: Sprouts into a small sapling (1D4+4 feet tall).
growthStages.abilitiesAtStage: Nightbane can see, hear, and feel everything within a 20 foot (6.1 m) radius by concentrating for 1 minute.

Nightbane can meld with and hide inside the tree. Heals at double rate, needs no food/water, gains awareness in 200 ft radius. Tree acts as a P.P.E. battery containing 5D6+6 P.P.E. accessible up to 1 mile away.

growthStages.growthStageSummary: Doubles in size a final time.
growthStages.abilitiesAtStage: Gains full lifespan extension, coma/death bonuses, and secret Hit Point buffer.

name: Shadows of Despair
description: Manipulates the emotions of victims, plunging them into the depths of despair and hopelessness.

enhancement.summary: Spending 120 P.P.E. extends the duration to 1D4+2 days.

limitations.otherLimitations: Cannot make someone suicidal. Successful save grants 24-hour immunity.

rangeAndArea.rangeSummary: Two targets by touch or one target up to 100 feet (30.5 m) away; line of sight required.

duration.durationSummary: 1D4+1 melee rounds per 12 P.P.E. spent, or 1D4+2 days if 120 P.P.E. is spent.

savingThrows.bonusToSaveSummary: Magical, supernatural, and alien beings get +5 to save.

statusAlterations.summary: -6 on Perception Rolls, initiative, and save vs Horror Factor. -3 on saving throws and all other combat bonuses. -25% on skill rolls (-50% if life and death). Interrogators gain +20%. Remaining combat bonuses halved. Victim fatigues twice as fast and heals at half rate. 60% chance to flee/surrender at half HP unless a M.E. save of 16 is made.

name: Shadow Swarm
description: Creates a horrific illusion of a swarm of vermin moving about in the shadows that corrals targets or causes them to flee.

cannotAffect: Brightly lit areas (the swarm cannot enter light)

duration.durationSummary: One melee round (15 seconds) + 8 seconds per level of experience.

savingThrows.bonusToSaveSummary: Horror factor is 12 for typical Nightbane, 17 for those with a phobia of vermin/darkness.

statusAlterations.summary: Victims who step in or are caught by the swarm vanish into shadows for one melee round + 10 seconds per level. They experience peace and reappear unhurt at the same location.

name: Share the Needle
description: Recreates some of the worst effects of drug addiction and withdrawal to debilitate an enemy, or can be used to instantly sober someone up.

enhancement.summary: Spend 20 P.P.E. to extend the duration to 1D4x10 minutes.

duration.durationSummary: 1D6 minutes per 5 P.P.E., or 1D4x10 minutes per 20 P.P.E.

savingThrows.bonusToSaveSummary: Supernatural or magical creatures suffer half penalties. A save of 12 is used when resisting the 'Sober Up' effect.

statusAlterations.summary: Anxiety/Restlessness/Wired: -20% to all skills, -1 to Perception, -3 to save vs Horror Factor.
Cold Sweats: Highly uncomfortable, -5% on all skills. Tracking victim by scent is +15%.
Dizziness: When moving faster than Spd 4 or fighting: -2 attacks, -4 to all combat rolls, -40% to skills. Balance-related skills are impossible.
Fatigue: Spd, attacks, and combat bonuses halved. -10% to skills. Fatigues twice as fast.
Headache: -1 to initiative and Perception, -20% to skills, -1 to all saving throws.
Muscle Cramps: P.S., P.P., Spd, and all combat bonuses reduced by half.
Nausea/Vomiting: Moving faster than half Spd or strenuous activity has a 0-75% chance per melee of causing vomiting. Vomiting uses all but one melee attack and costs initiative.
Tremors: P.P., Spd, and skill performance reduced by half. -6 to strike with ranged/thrown weapons.
Sober Up: Alleviates drug/alcohol highs within 1D4 melee rounds and reduces subsequent hangover/withdrawal symptoms by half.

name: Sideshow
description: Grants the user the remarkable ability to move like a trained acrobat or gymnast while in and out of combat.

duration.durationSummary: One minute per level of experience.

statusAlterations.summary: +2 to parry and dodge, +3 to roll with punch/fall/impact. No strike penalties applied for attacking on the move. +2 to strike with kick attacks, +2 to disarm.

name: Summoner
description: Summons demonic minions (Sub-Demons, Lesser Demons, or a Greater Demon) from magical portals to serve the user.

enhancement.summary: Can add enhancements to demons at 5 P.P.E. per demon, up to three enhancements total.
enhancement.stepDefinition: Adds +5 P.S./+50 S.D.C., Flight, Stealth, Biting Jaws, Armament, or Firepower to summoned demons.

limitations.otherLimitations: Can summon up to three Sub-Demons (20 P.P.E. each), two Lesser Demons (40 P.P.E. each), or one Greater Demon (80 P.P.E. each).

rangeAndArea.rangeSummary: Portals open up to 30 feet (9.1 m) away. Demons can travel up to 1,000 feet (305 m) away per level of experience.

duration.durationSummary: Sub-Demons: 40 minutes. Lesser Demons: 20 minutes. Greater Demon: 10 minutes.

name: The Ties that Bind
description: Creates ensnaring chains, razor wire, or tendrils that shoot out to entangle, damage, and torture an opponent.

enhancement.summary: +1 P.P.E. per additional point of P.S. for the tendril (max 24). Agony pulses cost 2 P.P.E. per tendril.

rangeAndArea.rangeSummary: 20 feet (6.1 m) + 5 feet (1.5 m) per level of experience.

duration.durationSummary: One minute (4 melee rounds) per level of experience.

attacksAndDamage.baseDamageSummary: Tendril strike does 4D6 damage (6D6 against Nightlords/minions). Constriction does half damage (2D6) and cannot be defended against. Tendrils have P.S. 16 and +3 to strike/entangle.
attacksAndDamage.actionCost: Breaking free takes two melee actions.

savingThrows.bonusToSaveSummary: -2 penalty to save for each tendril beyond the first when agony pulsing.

statusAlterations.summary: One tendril imposes -2 to subsequent combat rolls. Two tendrils double this to -4. Three or more prevent any defensive action except parrying with a free limb at -6.
Throat constriction (requires Called Shot 16+ unmodified): Cuts off airway. Unconsciousness in 1D6+4 melees, coma after 1D4+2 mins, death in 2D4 mins.
Agony Pulse (Failed Save): Victim loses two attacks and cannot use spells, psionics, skills, or do anything but scream for the melee round.
Agony Pulse (Successful Save): Victim loses one melee attack and is -1 to save against the next agony pulse.

name: Too Much Stereo
description: Turns the Nightbane into a stadium-quality sound system, capable of projecting voice or music at up to 150 decibels, or firing directed sonic blasts.

limitations.otherLimitations: Targets may not be selected individually for the AoE effects; everyone within range is affected. Highly likely to attract authorities and Nightlords' minions.

rangeAndArea.rangeSummary: Clearly heard up to 2 miles (3.2 km) away outdoors.

duration.durationSummary: Up to one minute per level of experience.

rangeAndArea.rangeSummary: Clearly heard up to 2 miles (3.2 km) away outdoors.
rangeAndArea.areaOfEffectSummary: 500 feet (152.4 m) radius for debilitating effects.

duration.durationSummary: Up to one minute per level of experience.

statusAlterations.summary: Without hearing protection: Must shout to communicate (5 ft range max), -3 on Perception Rolls (-6 if requiring hearing), -2 on initiative, -2 to parry and disarm, -4 to dodge, and -15% on skill performance.

attacksAndDamage.actionCost: Can only be fired once per melee round, and counts as one melee attack.

rangeAndArea.rangeSummary: Column-shaped (600 feet / 183 m long, 6 feet / 1.8 m in diameter) OR Cone-shaped (300 feet / 91.4 m long, 45-90 degree arc).

statusAlterations.summary: Knocks victims off their feet, causes loss of initiative, and loss of two melee attacks.

name: Urban Golem
description: Quickly cobble together a dull-witted Golem-like automaton from man-made materials to serve as backup in combat.

limitations.otherLimitations: Only one automaton can be created and controlled. Nightbane loses all but two of their own attacks per melee round while controlling it. Needs to be commanded or it just swats nearby targets.

rangeAndArea.rangeSummary: Created up to 50 feet (15.2 m) away. Commanded up to 600 feet (183 m) away.

environmentalMaterialScaling.sdcOrHpSummary: 2D4x10+20 S.D.C., Natural A.R. 8. Fire-based attacks ignore A.R. and do 50% more damage.

environmentalMaterialScaling.materialSummary: Lightweight Structural Metal or Metal Scrap

createdObjects.notes: Attributes: I.Q. 5, M.E. 6, M.A. 6, P.S. 22 (Supernatural), P.P. 10, P.E. 10, P.B. 4, Spd 14. 4 attacks/melee, +2 strike/parry/dodge, +3 roll with impact. 3D6 punch, 6D6 power punch, 2D6 bite, 4D6 claws. Horror Factor 1D4+9. 7-10 feet tall, 3 tons. Immune to poisons, illusions, mind control, air/food requirements, and HF.

name: War Cry
description: Unleash a supernatural howl powerful enough to demoralize and cow enemies.

enhancement.summary: Five P.P.E. per each +1 bonus to the Talent user's Horror Factor and the volume and ferocity of the cry.

attacksAndDamage.actionCost: Uses half of the Nightbane's attacks for that melee round.

rangeAndArea.rangeSummary: Up to 1 mile (1.6 km) away (must be able to hear it). Can be reduced to 150 feet (45.7 m).

duration.durationSummary: Instant results that last for 1D4 melee rounds.

savingThrows.bonusToSaveSummary: Target number is based on user's Horror Factor + enhancements (maximum save required is 18). Boosting the Horror Factor beyond 18 counteracts victims' bonuses to save on a 1:1 basis.

statusAlterations.summary: On a failed save: 1D4x10% of enemies run away. The rest fight at -1 melee attack and all combat bonuses are reduced by half for 1D4 melee rounds.

name: Anti-Arcane
description: When activating this Talent, the Nightbane is surrounded by an aura of black light (easily confused with the Shadow Shield). While this aura is in effect, the Nightbane is utterly invulnerable to the effects of magic! Any magical spell that can be resisted by a save against magic will have no effect on the character. Spells that must be dodged, or have no saving throw, will work normally.

name: Borrow Morphus
description: This rare power allows a Nightbane to assume the Morphus of another of his kind! The character gains the shape, all physical attributes, S.D.C. and Hit Points of the borrowed shape. He can also use any of the Talents possessed by the Nightbane he is imitating, but only abilities that the borrowing character knew the other possessed. The borrowing Nightbane cannot use his own Talents until he resumes his true form.

enhancement.summary: 15 P.P.E. for each additional minute the borrowed Morphus is kept.

name: Darksong
description: The Nightbane can emit a piercing, deafening sound; it can be an inhuman howl, a mighty roar, an ultrasonic keening, or even electronic feedback, depending on the Nightbane's Morphus. Targets must make a roll to save (P.E. bonuses apply); if they roll under a 10, they are stunned for 1D4 melee rounds.

enhancement.summary: The attacker can raise the number needed to save by expending additional P.P.E.: +1 point per 3 P.P.E.

penaltiesOnAffectedCharacters.notes: Stunned for 1D4 melee rounds on a failed save.

save.summary: Save vs magic 10 (or higher if enhanced). Everyone in an AoE blast saves at +4 to resist.

name: Darkwhip
description: Creates tendrils of darkness that inflict supernatural damage with a P.S. equal to the amount of P.P.E. spent on creating them. The tendrils can have any shape, not limited to whips and tentacles, although those are the most common. The Darkwhip can be used to strike and also to entangle or disarm, provided those skills are known to the wielder.

enhancement.summary: Additional P.P.E. increases the P.S. of the whip, which increases the amount of damage it inflicts.

ppeScaling.summary: Supernatural damage uses a P.S. equal to the P.P.E. spent.

name: Doorway
description: Creates a door of dark energy that leads to a specific location desired by the creator of it. The Nightbane must have been to the destination point at least once in his life, or he must have line of sight.

activationTiers.name: Nightlands Doorway
activationTiers.effectDescription: Opens a doorway to the Nightlands or back.

rangeOverride.summary: 40 P.P.E. plus 5 P.P.E. per mile (1.6 km) to cross over.

enhancement.summary: 2 P.P.E. spent per mile of distance.

ranges.summary: To a location up to 1 mile (1.6 km) per 2 P.P.E. spent.

activationTime.summary: One melee round (15 seconds) of concentration

name: Infectious Control
description: This often-repulsive Talent allows the Nightbane to take over a person by 'infecting' him with a portion of his body. While in control, the Nightbane can see, hear and experience everything his victim does while he acts as puppeteer, controlling every word and movement of the victim. The Nightbane has to split his concentration between his own body and that of his victim.

enhancement.summary: 20 P.P.E. every additional half hour. Memory search costs 5 P.P.E. per piece of information.

duration.summary: Controlled for 30 minutes. Victims who have an M.E. of 7 or less are controlled for an hour at a time.

activationTime.summary: Usually takes one melee round from the time the piece of the Nightbane has entered the body of the victim.

penaltiesOnCaster.notes: Attacks/actions are divided evenly between the two bodies, no initiative bonus, and combat bonuses and skill performance are reduced by half unless control is relinquished.

save.summary: Save vs magic at the end of the first round to resist control. New saves allowed every 10 minutes.
Save vs psionics to resist the intrusion of a memory search.

name: Lightning Rider
description: The Nightbane becomes a being of pure electrical energy! While in electrical form, the Nightbane can travel through conductive materials at enormous speeds. The Nightbane appears to become a small pool of sparks, or a small, crackling lightning ball if no conductive material is around. The Nightbane can hitch rides on modem calls or travel through telephone lines.

enhancement.summary: The Nightbane can increase the voltage to inflict damage: 1D6 S.D.C. per 5 P.P.E. per each attack.

damageModifiersNote: 8 points of damage will fry most electronics. Specially shielded systems survive 40 points of damage.

name: Mirror Sight
description: Enables the Nightbane to see the other side of a mirror, into the Nightlands, and vice versa, as if it were a window. A mirror or any highly reflective surface (glass, polished metal, a quiet body of water) must be available. The character can only see what the mirror image faces in the Nightlands, and vice versa.

limitations.otherLimitations: Requires a mirror.

duration.summary: 10 minutes per level of the character's experience.

name: Mirror Search
description: The Nightbane is able to see through the mirror closest to the person or object he seeks. This does not mean that the nearest mirror will reveal the target of the search, but the closest area and mirror to it.

enhancement.summary: +5 P.P.E. per additional 10 miles (16 km).

areaOfEffect.summary: Effectively scans a 10 mile (16 km) radius.

name: Nightbringer
description: Absorbs light around the Nightbane, creating an area of darkness. The power also absorbs energy attacks, except Shadow Blast, Darkwhip and other darkness-based attacks and magic.

enhancement.summary: Each additional 2 P.P.E. increases the diameter of the darkness by 10 feet (3 m).

areaOfEffect.summary: 10 feet (3 m) in diameter per every 2 P.P.E. spent.

penaltiesOnAffectedCharacters.notes: Penalties are halved for creatures with nightvision.

name: Premonition
description: Gives the character feelings and visions about the future, often at unexpected times or at moments of crisis. These feelings will give the character a feeling that something good, bad or dangerous is going to happen soon.

ppe.notes: 2 P.P.E. to activate actively, and 2 P.P.E. when a spontaneous occurrence happens.

name: Reshape Facade
description: Nightbane with this Talent can temporarily alter the shape of the Facade, changing the features, hair color and even the size of their human form. Imitating a particular person is possible, but very difficult to get right.

enhancement.summary: 4 P.P.E. per additional hour the disguise is desired.

name: See Truth
description: Every time this power is activated, the Nightbane is able to see the true nature of one person or object. This includes actually seeing a Nightbane's Facade and Morphus forms, superimposed one over the other. The alignment of the target can also be seen. It also reveals strong emanations of magic, the undead/vampires, serious illness, and strong emotions.

enhancement.summary: Every additional 4 P.P.E. raises the save number by +1 (maximum of 18, for 24 P.P.E.).

ranges.summary: Line of sight up to 300 feet (91 m) away.

save.summary: Save against magic (12 or higher) to resist revealing the truth.

name: Shadow Blast
description: Fires a black energy bolt that does 1D4 S.D.C. for every point of P.P.E. spent on it.

enhancement.summary: 1 P.P.E. per every 1D4 points of damage.

ranges.summary: 500 feet/152 m

damageModifiersNote: Damage is 1D4 S.D.C. per 1 P.P.E. spent.

name: Shadow Shield
description: Creates a force field of dark energy around the Nightbane. The Shadow Shield completely surrounds the character, protecting him from toxic gases, disease, punches, bullets, heat, fire, and similar dangers as long as it remains in force; it is the shield that takes the damage inflicted by such attacks.

enhancement.summary: 2 P.P.E. for each additional 20 S.D.C.

maxEnhancementPpePerActivation.notes: Maximum of 4 P.P.E. spent per level of experience, granting a maximum of 40 S.D.C. per level.

duration.summary: 30 minutes per level of experience or until all the S.D.C. of the shadow shield is used up.

name: Sharing the Flesh
description: The Nightbane touches an injured person to magically transfer the other person's wounds, injury and pain to himself. The person being healed falls into a coma or sleep that lasts 1D4 melee rounds and then awakens completely well. The Nightbane can transfer as much damage as he or she can tolerate. This is a painful sacrifice.

activationTiers.name: Critically injured healing
activationTiers.effectDescription: Healing critically injured/comatose characters requires temporarily expending 24 P.P.E. and 100 S.D.C./Hit Points to stabilize the person and heal them to 2D6 Hit Points. The Nightbane falls into a coma for 2D4x10 minutes.

limitations.otherLimitations: The Nightbane must perform this act of sacrifice of his own free will.

ranges.summary: Touch

healing.summary: Transfers damage to the Nightbane, fully healing the target. Critically injured targets are brought to 2D6 Hit Points.

name: The Shroud
description: Enables a Nightbane to become invisible and noiseless to normal vision and senses as well as to electronic devices like cameras, motion detectors, heat sensors, etc. This ability can be used selectively. The moment the Nightbane attacks anybody, the Talent stops working.

enhancement.summary: 10 P.P.E. to activate per each minute in effect.

limitations.otherLimitations: First, the Nightbane must get out of sight. A Nightbane actively engaged in combat or standing in plain sight cannot activate this Talent.

name: Shadow Slide
description: The character becomes an insubstantial shadow. While in this two-dimensional form, the Nightbane can slither along walls or across the ground, virtually invisible and able to slide through any opening, no matter how narrow.

enhancement.summary: 10 P.P.E. per each minute the Talent is maintained. Objects can be carried at an additional 2 P.P.E. per pound (0.45 kg).

name: Soul Shield
description: Protects against mental attacks/probes and the See Truth Talent. The Soul Shield acts like a psychic mind block. While the Soul Shield is up, any spell or power that tries to control or dominate the Nightbane's mind will automatically fail.

name: Splittin' Image
description: Enables the Nightbane to separate his Facade and Morphus forms and act normally in both of them! The character is aware of what both sides are doing, but his consciousness must be focused on one form or the other. The unfocused form lapses into a trance-like state.

enhancement.summary: 10 P.P.E. per each additional hour.

duration.summary: One or more hours depending on the amount of P.P.E. expended.

penaltiesOnAffectedCharacters.notes: Penalties apply to the trance-like form the character is not currently focusing on.

name: Storm Maker
description: Enables the Nightbane to control the weather. Rain, winds and the temperature can be altered.

activationTiers.name: Minor change
activationTiers.effectDescription: Raise wind by up to 5 mph (8 km), alter cloudiness/rain, alter overall temperature by 4 degrees Fahrenheit.

activationTiers.name: Moderate change
activationTiers.effectDescription: Start rain on an overcast day, turn a downpour into a storm or vice versa, alter overall temperature by 10 degrees Fahrenheit.

activationTiers.name: Major change
activationTiers.effectDescription: Start rain during a clear day, stop a downpour, create a major thunderstorm during a rainy day, alter overall temperature by 20 degrees Fahrenheit.

activationTiers.name: Extreme change
activationTiers.effectDescription: Create a fog, start a hailstorm or electrical storm during a clear day, turn a thunderstorm into a tropical storm (70 mph/112 km winds), alter overall temperature by 30 degrees Fahrenheit.

activationTiers.name: Total upheaval
activationTiers.effectDescription: Start a hurricane or tornado (90+ mph/144 km winds), create a blinding snowstorm, dissipate a terrible storm, alter overall temperature by 50 degrees Fahrenheit.

enhancement.summary: Each additional mile of radius doubles the previous P.P.E. cost.

areaOfEffect.summary: Base radius of one mile (1.6 km).

duration.summary: Effects take 1D6x10 minutes to manifest, and then last one hour.

name: Bloodbath
description: This grotesque power allows the Nightbane to use his own blood to suffocate victims. A stream of blood pours from the character and rushes into the victim's nose and throat.

prerequisites.summary: At least one characteristic from the Stigmata Table.

ppe.notes: Activating the Talent inflicts 1D6 S.D.C. points of damage on the user.

damageModifiersNote: Inflicted at the end of each melee round.

penaltiesOnAffectedCharacters.notes: Victim is at -2 on all combat actions and is unable to use spells, Talents or any skill that requires concentration.

save.summary: A successful save versus non-lethal poison will avoid damage for that round, but the penalties remain.
A victim unfamiliar with that attack must save versus a Horror Factor of 12 to avoid panicking. If panicked, the penalties for the victim are doubled.

secondarySave.summary: If panicked, the penalties are doubled.

conditionalPenaltyMultipliersOnFailure.notes: Combat penalties for the victim are doubled if panicked.

name: Deus Ex Machina
description: The Nightbane can control machines from cars to microwaves, to lamps or weapons.

enhancement.summary: 6 P.P.E. for each additional minute of control.

areaOfEffect.summary: Control radius can be expanded by spending extra P.P.E.

areaScalingByPpeStep.stepDefinition: 20 P.P.E. for an additional 100 foot (30.5 m) radius of control.

objectsAffected.summary: One device can be controlled for every three points of I.Q. he has.

notes: While the Nightbane can control several machines, only one of them can be directly controlled on an action-by-action basis. The remaining mechanisms can be given a general order for the rest of the round. The character can also seize control of guns and explosive devices.

name: Swarm Self
description: Causes the Nightbane's body to separate into tiny animals of the same animal type as the character.

prerequisites.summary: At least one characteristic from the Animal or Insect Form Table.

enhancement.summary: An additional 10 points for each additional two minutes.

ranges.summary: Self; once a swarm, the range is unrestricted.

swarmMechanics.collectivePoolSummary: Each swarm member has 5 S.D.C. and 1 Hit Point. A swarm of 10 critters will have 50 S.D.C. and 10 Hit Points. Attacks on the swarm have no modifiers to hit.

reversionDamageCarryover.summary: The hit point (not S.D.C.) damage taken by the swarm carries over to the Nightbane's hit points after the swarm is destroyed or recalled.

swarmMechanics.notes: In combat, they do 1 point of S.D.C. damage individually. If the swarm takes more than half its S.D.C. damage, damage is reduced to 2D6. When all S.D.C. is depleted, only two swarmlings remain. At least two swarmlings must be present for the Nightbane to rebuild himself.

name: Lord/Lady of the Wild
description: The Nightbane gains mastery over any animal species he/she is associated with.

prerequisites.summary: At least one characteristic from the Animal Form Table.

limitations.otherLimitations: Control is limited to the appropriate species.

activationTiers.name: Calling animals
activationTiers.effectDescription: Calling animals of the appropriate species from up to a one mile (1.6 km) radius per level of experience.

rangeOverride.summary: One mile (1.6 km) per level of experience

activationTiers.name: Minor, non-dangerous actions
activationTiers.effectDescription: Like making noise, hiding, fluttering about per large animal or per group of up to ten small animals.

activationTiers.name: Dangerous actions
activationTiers.effectDescription: Threatening humans, bite/attack, or behavior that goes against the animal's normal behavior per large animal or per group of up to ten small animals.

activationTiers.name: Suicidal actions
activationTiers.effectDescription: Recklessly attacking humans or supernatural beings, intercepting vehicles, fight to the death per large animal or per group of up to ten small animals.

ranges.summary: 500 feet (152 m) to control/command.

name: Air Grab
description: The Nightbane can "grab" somebody up to 50 feet (15.2 m) away +10 feet (3 m) per additional level by making a grabbing gesture in the direction of the target. The grab simply holds a person for two melee actions, or roughly 5 seconds, during which time he cannot move or physically attack.

enhancement.summary: Maintained per grabbing action.

limitations.otherLimitations: Victims must know they are being targeted with this power to avoid it, and even then they need to roll a 16 or higher to dodge.

holdsAndEscapes.combinedPsToBreakEffect: equal to or greater than the Nightbane's

damage.summary: An "air squeeze" does supernatural P.S. punch damage; use the Nightbane's P.S. minus five points and counts as two melee attacks.

name: Astral Self
description: The Nightbane becomes an astral being with no physical body. In astral form, the character has all the abilities and limitations of an astral projection, but without a silver cord, or leaving his physical body behind. The S.D.C. of the astral-self is equal to the combined S.D.C. and Hit Points of the Nightbane, times two!

name: Darkwave
description: The Nightbane becomes an engulfing, semi-liquid mass of pure darkness that can engulf and suffocate opponents.
