enhancement.summary: Maintained per 30 seconds (two melee rounds).

limitations.otherLimitations: Vulnerable to light, and not advisable in daylight.

rules: Takes half damage from physical attacks directed at the darkness.
Takes double damage from energy and magical attacks from those not trapped inside.

Strong light inflicts damage: no damage from streetlights, 1D6 from a pen light (range: 5 feet/1.5 m), 3D6 from a commercial flashlight (range 10 feet/3 m), 5D6 from a high-powered or police flashlight, and 1D6x10 from a spotlight or magic light or Guardian. (Once per melee round per light wielder).
Cannot be used during the day, or the Nightbane will take 1D6x10 points of damage at the end of every melee round.

name: Dervish Dance
description: The Nightbane can move in a circular pattern and make spinning attacks with incredible speed. The character becomes a blur, as he spins at blurring speeds in a large circle - a circular area 10 feet (3 m) in diameter.

enhancement.summary: Maintained per melee round.

limitations.otherLimitations: Limited to a 10 foot (3 m) diameter striking range. Must be the Nightbane's first attack of that melee round, and counts as all the character's melee attacks for that round.

damage.summary: All opponents within, or who enter the dance zone gets attacked as if the Nightbane had made an attack roll of 10 + 1 per level of Nightbane (maximum 19). The Nightbane also uses this attack roll number to automatically parry all incoming attacks (except energy attacks).

notes: Instead of a standard modifier, this talent sets an 'as-if' attack roll of 10 + 1 per level (max 19) replacing standard combat rolls.

name: Dreamer
description: With this power the Nightbane can enter the Dreamstream body and soul. While in the Dreamstream, the Nightbane has a 'psychic S.D.C.' equal to his normal S.D.C. and Hit Points combined.

limitations.otherLimitations: If all psychic S.D.C. are reduced to below zero, the character is slain and vanishes as if he never existed.

name: Piece Work
description: By using this power, the Nightbane can remove a part of his own flesh; some actually remove an eye, ear, or other sensory body parts, but a finger or toe will do just as well. The body part will be able to hear, see and feel everything around it.

enhancement.summary: Maintenance cost per hour missing.

limitations.otherLimitations: The Nightbane cannot learn anything from the detached appendage until he reattaches it.

createdObjects.targetSummary: Detached sensory body part or appendage
createdObjects.notes: Each piece has 10 S.D.C. and 4 Hit Points (these cannot be regenerated until the piece is destroyed or reattached).

name: Air Swim
description: Enables the Nightbane to swim through the air the same as if it were water. A Nightbane does not suffer penalties from drying out or breathing air when using this Talent when his Morphus is of an aquatic nature.

enhancement.summary: Maintained after the first minute for 2 P.P.E. per each additional minute.

limitations.otherLimitations: Maximum height above the ground is 15 feet (4.6 m) per level of experience. Speed is the same as Swimming.

name: Fire Breather
description: The Nightbane is able to exhale a powerful jet of flames, similar to that of a flamethrower. The gout of fire inflicts 5D6 damage to anything caught in its path, unless stopped by a wall, vehicle or large object. The 'Bane is impervious to his own flames, as well as natural fire and heat when this Talent is active, but takes full damage from magical fire or the breath of other Nightbane.

limitations.otherLimitations: Can only be used once per melee round, but counts as an extra melee attack.

combat.rangeSummary: 30 feet (9.1 m) + 5 feet (1.5 m) per experience level

name: Heal Facade
description: Enables a Nightbane to extend the superhuman regeneration rate of his Morphus to his Facade for a limited amount of time. When activated, the Facade form heals 1D6+4 S.D.C./Hit Points per melee round.

enhancement.summary: 5 P.P.E. for each subsequent melee round of healing.

limitations.otherLimitations: Duration: One melee round per level of experience.

name: Severance
description: Temporarily shut down his supernatural aura, making himself undetectable to other Nightbane, psychics, mages and supernatural creatures who can sense and track the supernatural aura. It makes the character's aura appear to be that of an ordinary human. While suppressed, the 'Bane cannot use any other Talents or cast magic.

limitations.otherLimitations: Duration: One minute (4 melee rounds) per level of experience. Range: Self, only. Cuts off the user from casting magic or using other Talents while active.

name: Shadow Pockets
description: Access a mini-dimension suitable for storing small objects. Objects are held in a state of limbo and can remain indefinitely.

enhancement.summary: 8 P.P.E. to place or retrieve one object.

limitations.otherLimitations: Holds up to 5 lbs (2.25 kg) per level. No single object over 15 lbs (6.75 kg). Takes one melee attack/action to place or retrieve. If killed in Morphus, objects drop. If killed in Facade, objects are lost forever.

name: Shadow Weapon
description: Create a melee weapon made of dark energy. Must be a one-piece melee weapon chosen when the Talent is acquired. The weapon is substantial, can parry, but disappears if it leaves the Nightbane's hands.

enhancement.summary: 5 P.P.E. for each subsequent melee round of use.

opponentConditionalModifiers.notes: Does 50% greater damage to Night Princes and Nightlords!

name: Speed Darkling
description: Gives the Nightbane incredible speed equal to Spd attribute x 10 mph. Provides +1 attack per melee, +1 initiative, +4 auto-dodge. When duration ends, character suffers exhaustion penalties.

enhancement.summary: 5 P.P.E. for each minute of additional use.

limitations.otherLimitations: Duration: 1 minute per level of experience. Exhaustion penalty afterward for 1D6 melees (Spd halved, -1 attack, no initiative, -2 strike/parry/dodge).

name: A Face in the Crowd
description: Temporarily conceal inhuman appearance under the guise of a very average looking human being (P.B. 1D4+8). Temporarily loses all Morphus abilities (flight, weapon limbs, claws, etc.), but stats remain unchanged.

enhancement.summary: 5 P.P.E. for each minute of continued duration.

morphusTablePrerequisites: Must have at least one monstrous or alien trait/feature
limitations.otherLimitations: Does not mask supernatural aura.

name: Abduction
description: A single target is whisked away by dark energies to a limbo-like pocket dimension. No harm comes to the target, but they are stuck unless they can teleport.

enhancement.summary: +6 P.P.E. for each additional melee round.

combat.rangeSummary: 90 feet (27 m) + 10 feet (3 m) per level of experience

name: Commanding Presence
description: Temporarily increases M.A. by six points (minimum 22). On a successful Trust/Intimidate roll, observers must save or be completely swayed by the Nightbane. Cumulative with Animal Magnetism.

enhancement.summary: 6 P.P.E. for each two minutes thereafter.

limitations.otherLimitations: Nightbane and supernatural creatures are +3 to save.

name: Forbidding Woods
description: Radiates an aura of fear and confusion over a large area of woodland. Trees seem threatening, shadows deepen, and victims must save vs Horror Factor 16 or flee.

enhancement.summary: 7 P.P.E. per 100 foot radius affected.

combat.durationSummary: 30 seconds (2 melee rounds) per level of experience

name: Gorgon's Touch
description: Physical touch turns the target temporarily into stone. Failed saves temporarily drain P.P., P.E., and Spd by 20%. Once attributes are reduced to 1, the victim is completely petrified.

combat.durationSummary: Petrification lasts 1 minute per level of the Nightbane.

statusEffects.effectSummary: P.P., P.E., and Spd attributes reduced by 20% on each failed save touch.
Target turns completely into stone when attributes are reduced to 1.

name: Guardian Angel
description: Selects a single target for mystical protection. Any damage directed at the protected individual is transferred to the Nightbane Guardian Angel. Drops when Nightbane is reduced to 15 Hit Points.

limitations.otherLimitations: Only available to Aberrant, Unprincipled, Scrupulous, or Principled alignments. Range: Line of Sight. Can target up to 2 people per level.

name: Kill Switch
description: Mimics the effects of an EMP, temporarily shutting down all unprotected electronic devices and erasing unprotected magnetic/hard drive data within a 100 foot radius.

limitations.otherLimitations: Hardened military electronics and Nightbane's own gear are unaffected.

name: Lend a Hand
description: Temporarily lend an Unnatural or Weapon Limb to another human or Nightbane character. The recipient gains an exact copy of the limb complete with its physical characteristics (claws, supernatural strength, etc.).

enhancement.summary: 3 P.P.E. for every additional melee round.

limitations.otherLimitations: Does not work on supernatural beings other than Nightbane.

name: Nightshade
description: Releases a chemical scent that puts those who fail a save into a deep sleep for 2D4+2 minutes. Even successful saves inflict penalties (-1 attack, -2 combat rolls, -10% skills).

combat.rangeSummary: 20 foot (6 m) radius + 5 feet (1.5 m) per level
combat.savingThrow: Save vs Non-Lethal Poison (16 or higher)

name: Spelljack
description: Hijack control of a spell cast near the Nightbane or on a target in range. The Nightbane may cancel it, keep it, alter duration/range, or seize control of Living Spells.

enhancement.summary: Activation costs one quarter the P.P.E. of the spell being jacked (rounded up).

limitations.otherLimitations: Only affects spell magic. Cannot affect rituals, wards, circles, runes, etc.

combat.rangeSummary: 25 feet (7.6 m) + 5 feet (1.5 m) per level of experience

name: The Taint
description: Anything the Nightbane touches decays. Metal rusts, cloth tatters. Living beings take magical necrotic damage that heals at half speed. Inflicts penalties to medical skills used to treat it.

enhancement.summary: +2 P.P.E. per 1D6 damage. Up to 6 P.P.E. (3D6) per level can be spent.

opponentConditionalModifiers.notes: Does 30% more damage to Night Princes and Nightlords

name: True Reflection
description: Imbues a mirror with supernatural power, showing the true face and alignment of anyone reflected in it. Causes specific psychological reactions or save bonuses based on the viewer's alignment.

enhancement.summary: Base cost varies by mirror size: 5 for pocket, 10 for medium, 15 for full-body, 20 for massive.

combat.rangeSummary: Touch and up to 50 feet away

alignmentGatedEffects.notes: Receive +2 to save vs Horror Factor and magic for 1D4 days.
+1 to save vs Horror Factor for 1D4 days.
Must save vs Horror Factor (14 for Diabolic/Miscreant, 10 for Aberrant) or recoil in fear, lose attack/initiative, and suffer -2 initiative for 1D4 days.

name: Vicious Cycle
description: The Nightbane becomes more physically imposing and aggressive, boosting P.S. and S.D.C. by 20% and gaining +1 attack per melee round.

combat.durationSummary: 1 melee round per level of experience

name: Voice of the Beast
description: Allows the Nightbane to communicate with the type of animal whose traits he bears. Communication method (telepathy or vocalization) is chosen at acquisition. The animal considers the Nightbane a friendly species member.

limitations.otherLimitations: Deactivates if the Nightbane speaks to anyone other than the animal.

name: Zombie Master
description: Enables the character to animate and control the dead. Animated minions continue to act on their last order even if the Nightbane is incapacitated.

enhancement.summary: 11 P.P.E. per additional dead animated.

limitations.otherLimitations: Can only animate one corpse per level of experience. Restricted to mortals or Nightbane stuck in Facade.

combat.rangeSummary: Animated dead must stay within 300 feet (91.5 m)

summonedOrCreatedBeing.notes: Uses the same statistics as dead animated by the Create Zombie ritual (Through the Glass Darkly, page 59).
